name: EAS Innovations Inc
description: Developer of a business software platform designed to revolutionize dealership management. The company's all-in-one platform streamlines dealership operations and brings the power of real-time accounting to the forefront of the industry, enabling clients to give advance dealer management system.

name: Eon Pass
description: Stop Counterfeits at scale for enterprises

name: IDX
description: Designer of a trading and investing platform designed for fans and investors to easily buy, sell, and trade shares in stocks of creative projects, media rights, and intellectual properties. The company's platform offers features like selling, investing, and trading in various creative works, establishing IP rights, and connecting with potential investors and collaborators, offering users a space to share, collaborate, and support each other and share intellectual property values within a dynamic marketplace.

name: Immigram LTD
description: Operator of an immigration platform intended to provide legal and technology expertise to immigrants. The company's platform allows users to fill out immigration forms and choose the various options and provides step-by-step guidance on the immigration process, enabling immigrants to overcome immigration complexity.

name: MeetAndy AI
description: MeetAndy helps software teams work faster and smarter by automating best practices.

name: Preciser
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-powered prediction platform designed to provide forecasts for sports betting. The company's integrated analytical tools allow for the interpretation of trends, the identification of outliers, and the observation of statistical insights through AI/ML predictions to provide an effective way to discover meaningful and accurate data, enabling sports bettors and fantasy sports players to shorten the time required for research and make well-informed projections with graphical analysis.

name: PurismEV
description: Operator of an AI energy efficiency company intended to improve motor and battery efficiency based on driving patterns. The company offers various services such as reducing environmental impact, increasing vehicle lifetime, reducing battery size, improving range performance, increasing energy efficiency, and improving acceleration, providing users with real-time vehicle monitoring.
